mapper.sql: select id, tenant_id, backup_path, mysqldump_path, backup_time, enabled, job_id, retain_days, last_backup_time, last_backup_status, last_backup_message, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sys_data_backup_config
mapper.update: update sys_data_backup_config set last_backup_time = #{lastBackupTime}, last_backup_status = #{lastBackupStatus}, last_backup_message = #{lastBackupMessage}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id}
update sys_data_backup_config set job_id = #{jobId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id}
